# Figure description: Карта_изуч_и_усл_обоз_к_карту_факт.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Общие_данные_для_всех_листов/Карта_изуч_и_усл_обоз_к_карту_факт.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **legend sheet (условные обозначения)** — specifically a comprehensive legend and key to the maps of actual (factual) material ("карты фактического материала"), accompanied by a small **index map** (схема) in the lower right showing the geographic distribution of drilling work by third-party organizations. This is Sheet No. 12 of the report.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The legend applies to the entire survey area covered by Report 36572 (map sheets M-42 and N-42, northern Kazakhstan). The index map in the lower right corner shows the spatial distribution of boreholes drilled by external ("сторонние") organizations whose data were incorporated into the report. The map appears to cover roughly the area of the Turgai Depression and adjacent regions of northern Kazakhstan (Kustanai, Tselinograd, Karaganda, and Dzhezkazgan oblasts). Roman numerals (XIII, XVI, XVII, XXXII, etc.) visible on the index map correspond to individual 1:200,000 map sheet quadrants.

---

## Key Content

The legend is organized into the following major categories:

### 1. **Geological Route Lines and Observation Points**
- Lines of geological traverses with observation point numbers and numbers of key sections.

### 2. **Fossil Find Localities (Места находок ископаемых остатков)**
- Symbols for fauna (2nd-order fauna collected by own and third-party organizations), flora (2nd-order flora), vertebrates, and fish — each with distinct graphic symbols (crosses, triangles, etc.).

### 3. **Sample Collection Points (Пункты отбора образцов)**
- Eight categories of sample types, including:
  - Microfaunal studies (8)
  - Microfaunal studies by third parties (8 variant)
  - Palynological studies (Ψ)
  - Palynological studies by third parties (Ψ° variant)

### 4. **Analytical Sample Sites (Места отбора проб)**
- Symbols for: spectral analysis (с), mineralogical analysis (м), silicate analysis (с), thermal analysis (т), X-ray structural analysis (р), carbonate analysis (к), spectrophotometric analysis (сп), chemical analysis (х), absolute age determination (а), physical property measurement (д), thin section description (ш).

### 5. **Reference Geological Cross-Sections**
- Named sections listed: Zhaksai-Kairktinsky, Tersakkanski, along Zhaman-Kairakty River, Arkalykski, Vladimirovski, Pokrovski, Borissovski sections; beginning and end of sections along Konur River; sections along the Konur River specifically.

### 6. **Structural-Search Boreholes (Структурно-поисковые скважины)**
- Symbols for Zapadno-Tenizskaya PSP boreholes (own organization), with depth in meters (numerator = borehole number, denominator = depth).
- Mapping boreholes of Zapadno-Tenizskaya PSP.

### 7. **Boreholes by Third-Party Organizations (Скважины, проведённые сторонними организациями)**
- Structural-search, reference, and mapping boreholes up to 400 m depth (with volcanic index and borehole number in numerator).
- Mapping boreholes up to 100 m depth.
- A long enumerated list of specific organizations and their borehole series, including:
  - VNIGRI, Andreev A.A., 1954
  - Aktubнефтеразведка trust, Rzhannikov V.E., 1957 and 1960
  - Churubai-Nurinsky coal expedition, 1956
  - PGO MGU, Nazarovich O.A., 1982
  - Dzhezkazvetka complex expedition, Zhminenko V.D., 1993
  - Karaganda PSP, Kiryukov F.I., 1963
  - Party NII-10, 1965
  - Karaganda PSP, Baidavleni G.N., 1965, 1968, 1971
  - From Baidavleni G.N. report 1971: mapping boreholes of other organizations drilled 1962–71

  - From Amutskaya PSP report: Turgai GRE mapping boreholes, 1982–86

  - Tselinograd GRE, Nazarov Yu.A., 1967–68
  - Karaganda PSP, Tersakkanska party, Kozesnik N.P., 1967–69
  - Dzhezkazgan GRE, Gustev A.D., 1967–69
